safe_mode.label: General | Safe Mode
safe_mode.helpText: If enabled, actions will only be logged, not executed on Reddit.

llm_provider.label: LLM | Provider
llm_provider.helpText: Reddit-approved LLMs only: Google Gemini or OpenAI ChatGPT. See Devvit LLM rules.

llm_api_key.label: LLM | API Key
llm_api_key.helpText: Optional. Required only when AI features are enabled below. Supplied by the installing moderator (not a Reddit Devvit encrypted secret).

llm_model.label: LLM | Model
llm_model.helpText: Pick a preset or choose Custom and enter a model ID below. Presets do not copy into the custom field. Empty custom with Custom selected uses the provider default model.

llm_model_custom.label: LLM | Custom model ID
llm_model_custom.helpText: Optional. Used when Model is Custom, or when this field is filled and no preset is selected. Leave empty to use the default model for your provider.

mod_attention_summaries_enabled.label: AI Mod Alerts | Include AI Context in Mod Notifications
mod_attention_summaries_enabled.helpText: When enabled, mod reports, modmail escalations, troll alerts, and audit logs include an extra AI-written summary explaining why moderators should review the item. Uses an additional LLM call per alert; falls back to the short rule reason or metrics-only text if the summary fails.

mod_attention_summary_prompt.label: AI Mod Alerts | Mod Alert Summary Prompt
mod_attention_summary_prompt.helpText: Optional instructions for AI-generated moderator alert summaries (violation and troll-review context).
mod_attention_summary_prompt.defaultValue: Write a brief, neutral summary for subreddit moderators: what happened, why it may need attention, and what to verify. Use plain sentences only (no bullet lists or tables). Stay factual; do not invent facts beyond the provided context.

ai_tldr_enabled.label: AI TLDR | Enable AI TLDR (Posts)
ai_tldr_enabled.helpText: If enabled, the bot will generate TLDR summaries for long posts.

tldr_word_count.label: AI TLDR | TLDR Word Count Threshold (Posts)
tldr_word_count.helpText: Minimum number of words to trigger a TLDR summary for posts.

tldr_prompt.label: AI TLDR | AI TLDR Prompt (Posts)
tldr_prompt.helpText: Custom instructions/prompt for generating post TLDR summaries.
tldr_prompt.defaultValue: You are a helpful assistant for a Reddit moderation bot. Read the following Reddit post and write a concise TLDR in 2-3 sentences. Be neutral, factual and friendly. Start with "TLDR:".

reddit_reference_tldr_enabled.label: AI TLDR | Enable Reddit crosspost/link TLDR (Posts)
reddit_reference_tldr_enabled.helpText: If enabled, when a post has little text but crossposts or links to another Reddit post, summarize that referenced content using the Reddit API (not external websites). Requires Enable AI TLDR (Posts).

post_tldr_pin.label: AI TLDR | Pin Post TLDR
post_tldr_pin.helpText: If enabled, the post TLDR comment is pinned at the top of the thread. If either this or Comment Summaries | Pin Comment Summary is enabled, bot top-level comments from those features will be pinned.

comment_tldr_enabled.label: AI TLDR | Enable AI TLDR (Comments)
comment_tldr_enabled.helpText: If enabled, the bot will generate TLDR summaries for long comments.

comment_tldr_word_count.label: AI TLDR | TLDR Word Count Threshold (Comments)
comment_tldr_word_count.helpText: Minimum number of words to trigger a TLDR summary for comments.

comment_tldr_prompt.label: AI TLDR | AI TLDR Prompt (Comments)
comment_tldr_prompt.helpText: Custom instructions/prompt for generating comment TLDR summaries.
comment_tldr_prompt.defaultValue: You are a helpful assistant for a Reddit moderation bot. Read the following Reddit comment and its parent context, and write a concise TLDR in 2-3 sentences. Be neutral, factual and friendly. Start with "TLDR:".

ai_moderation_enabled.label: AI Moderation | Enable AI Moderation
ai_moderation_enabled.helpText: If enabled, all new posts and comments will be evaluated against the moderation prompt.

moderation_prompt.label: AI Moderation | AI Moderation Prompt
moderation_prompt.helpText: Custom guidelines for moderation filtering. Tell the AI what rules to check against.
moderation_prompt.defaultValue: Evaluate whether the content violates this community's rules against spam, harassment, hate speech, severe hostility, or illegal activity.

moderation_action.label: AI Moderation | AI Moderation Action
moderation_action.helpText: Action to take when a violation of the AI Moderation Prompt is detected.

removal_modmail_enabled.label: AI Moderation | Send Modmail on Removal
removal_modmail_enabled.helpText: When AI moderation removes content and AI mod alert summaries are enabled, also send a private modmail to the mod team with the full AI context (in addition to the public removal reply to the author).

comment_summary_enabled.label: Comment Summaries | Enable Comment Summaries
comment_summary_enabled.helpText: If enabled, when a post reaches configured comment-count milestones, the bot summarizes the entire comment section and posts that TLDR-style summary as a comment in the same comment section.

comment_summary_milestones.label: Comment Summaries | Comment Milestones
comment_summary_milestones.helpText: Comma-separated comment counts that trigger summaries (e.g. 20,50,100).

comment_summary_prompt.label: Comment Summaries | Comment Summary Prompt
comment_summary_prompt.defaultValue: Synthesize the main viewpoints, key insights, and notable debates from the comments. Target around 100 words. Focus on substance, capture diverse perspectives, and highlight consensus/disagreements. Output only the summary.

comment_summary_pin.label: Comment Summaries | Pin Comment Summary
comment_summary_pin.helpText: If enabled, the discussion summary is pinned at the top of the thread. If either this or AI TLDR | Pin Post TLDR is enabled, bot top-level comments from post TLDRs or summaries will be pinned.

ai_summons_enabled.label: AI Summons | Enable AI Summons
ai_summons_enabled.helpText: If enabled, the bot responds to direct summons (e.g. hey bot, mod bot, ai bot, !bot).

action_mode.label: AI Summons | AI Summon & Reply Behavior
action_mode.helpText: Whether the AI replies when summoned or when its comments are replied to.

summon_prompt.label: AI Summons | AI Summon Prompt
summon_prompt.helpText: Custom instructions/prompt for summon reply replies.
summon_prompt.defaultValue: You are a helpful AI assistant for a Reddit community focused on AI and technology. A user has summoned you directly (for example with hey bot, mod bot, or !bot). Reply helpfully and concisely. Keep it under 3 sentences. Be positive and informative.

conversational_replies_enabled.label: Conversational Replies | Enable Conversational Replies
conversational_replies_enabled.helpText: If enabled, the bot will reply to users who reply directly to its comments.

conversational_replies_cooldown.label: Conversational Replies | Reply Cooldown (Hours)
conversational_replies_cooldown.helpText: How long to wait before replying to the same user again.

conversational_replies_daily_limit.label: Conversational Replies | Conversational Reply Daily Limit
conversational_replies_daily_limit.helpText: Maximum number of conversational replies the bot can post in a day.

conversational_replies_prompt.label: Conversational Replies | Conversational Replies Prompt
conversational_replies_prompt.helpText: System persona prompt for conversational replies.
conversational_replies_prompt.defaultValue: You are a friendly member of this community. A user has replied to one of your comments. Respond to them in a casual, conversational, human-like manner. Keep it brief (1-3 sentences).

flair_enabled.label: Flair System | Enable Subreddit Flair System
flair_enabled.helpText: If enabled, users can get flair based on their local milestones and AI-determined specialist roles.

flair_mode.label: Flair System | Flair Assignment Mode
flair_mode.helpText: Whether flairs are opt-in via comment command or automatically scanned for all posters.

milestone_flair_enabled.label: Flair System | Enable Milestone Flairs
milestone_flair_enabled.helpText: If enabled, the bot applies user flair based on how many posts and comments that user has made in this subreddit, using the configured milestone tiers.

milestone_tiers_json.label: Flair System | Milestone Tiers JSON
milestone_tiers_json.helpText: JSON array mapping comment/post counts to tier labels, ordered descending.

specialist_flair_enabled.label: Flair System | Enable Specialist Flairs
specialist_flair_enabled.helpText: Classify user's local comments using the configured LLM to assign a specialist role.

specialist_roles.label: Flair System | Specialist Roles List
specialist_roles.helpText: Comma-separated list of permitted specialist roles.
specialist_roles.defaultValue: Helpful Contributor, Frequent Answerer, Resource Finder, Discussion Starter, Community Builder, Generalist

specialist_prompt.label: Flair System | Specialist Persona Prompt
specialist_prompt.helpText: Prompt for the configured LLM to classify the user's role.
specialist_prompt.defaultValue: Analyze the user's comment history below and choose the single most appropriate role that describes their engagement style/focus. Respond with ONLY the selected role name.

troll_alert_enabled.label: Troll Alerts | Enable Troll Alerts
troll_alert_enabled.helpText: Send modmail if the user's average comment score in the sub is below the threshold.

troll_min_comments.label: Troll Alerts | Troll Minimum Comment Count
troll_min_comments.helpText: Minimum number of comments in this subreddit needed to run evaluation.

troll_average_score_threshold.label: Troll Alerts | Troll Average Score Threshold
troll_average_score_threshold.helpText: Trigger modmail if average local comment score is below this.
